parts.text: Not every agent is equal. A dependency bump is not a feature pull request — but the gate treats them the same.
Identity-aware policy rules tune the gate per author. Dependabot can skip the spec; a feature agent still clears every gate — and any loosening is loud, never silent.

One rule says Dependabot needs build and tests, not a spec. Its bump passes — but mergegate warns that it relaxed a gate for an agent. A feature agent gets no such pass: still blocked on the missing spec. And in CI, strict mode refuses any relaxed agent gate outright.
mergegate. Granular, identity-aware — and never silent. From deemwar.

captions.text: Per-identity rule: Dependabot needs build + tests, not a spec → PASS (with a warning).
A feature agent still needs every gate → ✘ BLOCKED on spec.
--strict: CI refuses any relaxed agent gate (exit 2).
